ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the state belongs to */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code for the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region */,
  "region_description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "pcap" REAL /* Per capita personal income */,
  "hwy" REAL /* Highway spending */,
  "water" REAL /* Water spending */,
  "util" REAL /* Utility spending */,
  "pc" REAL /* Personal consumption */,
  "gsp" REAL /* Gross state product */,
  "emp" REAL /* Employment */,
  "unemp" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source from which the data was collected */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser or device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes in this version */,
  "version_changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_version_author FOREIGN KEY ("version_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, private) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_category" TEXT /* Category of the data source (e.g., government, private, non-profit) */,
  "source_reliability" TEXT /* Rating of the reliability of the data source (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_mapping_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_mapping_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the validation */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validator */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "validation_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the validation process */,
  "validation_errors" TEXT /* List of any errors found during validation */,
  "validation_warnings" TEXT /* List of any warnings or concerns raised during validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_leader" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_team_leader FOREIGN KEY ("team_leader") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team working on the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project making the request */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_data_requests_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_data_requests_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)
